ogTitle: Hamlyn Terrace vs Hammondville: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hamlyn Terrace and Hammondville.
heading: Hamlyn Terrace vs Hammondville — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hamlyn Terrace, New South Wales and Hammondville, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hamlyn Terrace has a lower overall climate risk score (45/100) compared to Hammondville (50/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hamlyn Terrace or Hammondville safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hamlyn Terrace has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Hammondville scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hamlyn Terrace scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Hammondville scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hamlyn Terrace or Hammondville?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hamlyn Terrace has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
